No Poverty.reason: The course addresses educational gaps due to socio-economic status and includes readings on preventing poverty through education, aligning with Target 1.b on pro-poor strategies.
evidence: 縮短城鄉差距及社經地位差異所造成的英語程度落差
不能讓窮孩子落入永遠的貧困

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture was found in the course materials.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare was found in the course materials.

Quality Education.reason: The course, 'Ethnic Education,' is fundamentally about providing equitable and quality education for ethnic minorities, indigenous peoples, and new immigrants, directly addressing Targets 4.5 (equal access) and 4.7 (cultural diversity).

Gender Equality.reason: A reference book, '民族與性別之潛在課程' (The Hidden Curriculum of Ethnicity and Gender), explicitly links education to gender issues, supporting Target 5.c on strengthening policies.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to water, sanitation, or hygiene was found in the course materials.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency was found in the course materials.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to '培養學生未來的國際競爭力' (cultivate students' future international competitiveness), which has a very indirect link to future employment and decent work (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development was found in the course materials.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course is centered on promoting the social and political inclusion of ethnic minorities and indigenous peoples through education, directly addressing Targets 10.2 and 10.3.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course strongly supports Target 11.4 by focusing on safeguarding cultural heritage through ethnic education, language revitalization, and understanding cultural differences.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to sustainable consumption, production patterns, or waste management was found in the course materials.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to climate change, its impacts, or mitigation/adaptation strategies was found in the course materials.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or aquatic resources was found in the course materials.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land management was found in the course materials.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course analyzes non-discriminatory laws (e.g., '原住民族教育法') and international agreements ('聯合國原住民族權利宣言'), directly supporting Targets 16.b (non-discriminatory laws) and 16.3 (justice).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course uses a comparative approach, studying '國際的民族教育個案' (international cases) and involving guest speakers, fostering knowledge sharing and partnerships as per Targets 17.6 and 17.17.
